C

cancel() - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Subscription
Cancels this subscription, stopping all future message delivery.
clear() - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.ServiceRegistryImpl
Removes all registered services from the registry.

G

getAllServices(Class<T>) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.ServiceRegistry
Returns all registered services for the specified interface.

Returns all registered implementations for the specified service interface.

Returns the message headers.

Returns the message identifier.
getPayload() - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message
Returns the message payload.
getService(Class<T>) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.ServiceRegistry
Returns the first registered service for the specified interface.
getService(Class<T>) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.ServiceRegistryImpl
Returns the first registered implementation for the specified service interface.
getSourceApplicationId() - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message
Returns the source application identifier.
getTimestamp() - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message
Returns the message timestamp.
getTopic() - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message
Returns the message topic.
getTopic() - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Subscription
Returns the topic this subscription is listening to.

H

header(String, Object) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Adds a single message header.
headers(Map<String, Object>) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Sets the complete map of message headers.

I

id(String) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Sets the message ID.
InMemoryMessageBus - Class in org.flossware.jeventbus
In-memory message bus for inter-application communication.
InMemoryMessageBus() - Constructor for class org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus
Creates a new in-memory message bus.
isActive() - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Subscription
Checks if this subscription is still active and receiving messages.

M

Message - Class in org.flossware.jeventbus.api
Message for inter-application communication via the message bus.
Message.Builder - Class in org.flossware.jeventbus.api
Builder for constructing Message instances.
MessageBus - Interface in org.flossware.jeventbus.api
Publish/subscribe message bus for inter-application communication.
MessageHandler - Interface in org.flossware.jeventbus.api
Functional interface for handling messages received from the message bus.

O

onMessage(Message) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.MessageHandler
Called when a message is received on a subscribed topic.
org.flossware.jeventbus - package org.flossware.jeventbus
 
org.flossware.jeventbus.api - package org.flossware.jeventbus.api
 

P

payload(byte[]) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Sets the message payload.
publish(String, Message) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.MessageBus
Publishes a message to all subscribers of the specified topic.
publish(String, Message) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus
Publishes a message to the specified topic.

R

registerService(Class<T>, T) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.ServiceRegistry
Registers a service implementation under the specified interface.
registerService(Class<T>, T) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.ServiceRegistryImpl
Registers a service implementation for the specified interface.

S

ServiceRegistry - Interface in org.flossware.jeventbus.api
Service registry for inter-application service discovery.

Service registry for inter-application service discovery.

Creates a new service registry.
shutdown() - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus
Shuts down the message bus.
sourceApplicationId(String) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Sets the source application identifier.
subscribe(String, MessageHandler) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.MessageBus
Subscribes to receive messages on the specified topic.
subscribe(String, MessageHandler) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus
Subscribes to messages on the specified topic.
Subscription - Interface in org.flossware.jeventbus.api
Represents an active subscription to a message bus topic.

T

timestamp(long) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Sets the message timestamp.
topic(String) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Sets the message topic for routing.

U

unregisterService(Class<?>, Object) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.ServiceRegistry
Unregisters a specific service implementation.
unregisterService(Class<?>, Object) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.ServiceRegistryImpl
Unregisters a specific service implementation.
unsubscribe(Subscription) - Method in interface org.flossware.jeventbus.api.MessageBus
Unsubscribes from receiving messages.
unsubscribe(Subscription) - Method in class org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus
Unsubscribes the specified subscription.
